variables.description: Gender  1: Male, 2: Female, 999: Missing

variables.description: Family history of glaucoma in 1st degree relatives  1: Yes, 2: No, 99:  Unknown, 999: Missing

variables.description: Cigarette smoking status 1:  ever, 2:  never, 999:  Missing

variables.description: Blood or cheek cell DNA  1:  Blood, 2:  Cheek

variables.description: Spherical equivalent OS from distance refraction at time closest to DNA collection.  If pt is pseudophakic  use phakic refraction closest to DNA collection if possible.  999:  Missing

variables.description: Systemic calcium channel blocker user at IOP measurement 1: Yes, 2: No, 999:  Missing
